__comment__: Climatiq-derived preset catalog. data_version=33. Generated by desktop/scripts/climatiq-to-presets.mjs from BEIS, EPA, IPCC, GHG Protocol, ADEME, ecoinvent. Previous hand-curated v1 catalog kept in preset-sources.handcurated.json.
